title: Time Bomb
writer: Jacques-Laurent Bost, Yves Ciampi, Henri-François Rey
actors: Curd Jürgens, Mylène Demongeot, Alain Saury
plot: Jurgens is a sea captain in financial trouble. He plots to destroy his ship and collect insurance money by loading it with a time bomb and then sailing it into an active mine field. Watch for the gritty scene where a crewman becom...
